toolsDirectory.title: All Developer Tools
toolsDirectory.subtitle: Free online tools to help you code faster. No sign-up, no tracking, just tools that work.

home.heroHighlight: working with data, APIs, and debugging.
home.heroSubtitle1: Inspect JSON, decode tokens, parse URLs, convert formats.
home.heroSubtitle2: Everything runs locally in your browser — no data leaves your machine.
home.runsLocallyDesc: All processing happens in your browser. Your data never leaves your machine.
home.noSignUpDesc: No accounts, no login walls, no tracking. Open a tool and start working.
home.fastFocusedDesc: Lightweight tools built for developer workflows — not bloated with ads or upsells.
home.openSourceDesc: The full source code is public on GitHub. Inspect it, contribute, or fork it.

workflowTaglines.Data Inspection & Formatting: Format, validate, diff, and flatten JSON and structured data.
workflowTaglines.Auth & Encoding: Decode JWTs, encode Base64, and escape strings safely.
workflowTaglines.Request Debugging: Parse URLs, inspect headers, and convert cURL to fetch.
workflowTaglines.Patterns & Scheduling: Test regex patterns, parse cron expressions, and convert timestamps.

metadata.siteTitle: ToolHarbor – Fast Browser Tools for Developers
metadata.siteDescription: Fast browser tools for developers. Inspect JSON, decode tokens, parse URLs, convert formats — everything runs locally in your browser.
